question.text:
Dear Joanne & Kieran,

Thank you!

Best Regards,

answer.text:
Dear Ezgi,

Please find attached quick manual I sent your team yesterday. Any problem, please feel free to let us know.Thanks!


1.	How to approve customer registrer :

          →Please go to eserviceadm.culines.com <https://eserviceadm.culines.com/>  and log in with your ecommence ID & PW we provided before. (ID: MTIST    PW:Aa12345!)
          →Please refer to attched manual 'E-service Admin' and 'Partner Management'


2.	
	How to handle e-booking

          →Please go to https://ops.culines.com/ <https://ops.culines.com/>  and log in with your allegro user ID & PW

          →Please refer to the manual 'BKG 202310 Part A'  and 'BKG 202310 Part B'


Joanne Ding / 丁佳莹

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-13417033072

E-mail: joanneding@culines.com <mailto:joanne
